verse.verse_1: Atā amrullāhi falā tasta‘jilūh(u), subḥānahū wa ta‘ālā ‘ammā yusyrikūn(a).
verse.verse_2: Yunazzilul-malā'ikata bir-rūḥi min amrihī ‘alā may yasyā'u min ‘ibādihī an anżirū annahū lā ilāha illā ana fattaqūn(i).
verse.verse_4: Khalaqal-insāna min nuṭfatin fa iżā huwa khaṣīmum mubīn(un).
verse.verse_5: Wal-an‘āma khalaqahā lakum fīhā dif'uw wa manāfi‘u wa minhā ta'kulūn(a).
verse.verse_6: Wa lakum fīhā jamālun ḥīna turīḥūna wa ḥīna tasraḥūn(a).
verse.verse_7: Wa taḥmilu aṡqālakum ilā baladil lam takūnū bāligīhi illā bisyiqqil-anfus(i), inna rabbakum lara'ūfur raḥīm(un).
verse.verse_8: Wal-khaila wal-bigāla wal-ḥamīra litarkabūhā wa zīnah(tan), wa yakhluqu mā lā ta‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_9: Wa ‘alallāhi qaṣdus-sabīli wa minhā jā'ir(un), wa lau syā'a lahadākum ajma‘īn(a).
verse.verse_10: Huwal-lażī anzala minas-samā'i mā'al lakum minhu syarābuw wa minhu syajarun fīhi tusīmūn(a).
verse.verse_11: Yumbitu lakum bihiz-zar‘a waz-zaitūna wan-nakhīla wal-a‘nāba wa min kulliṡ-ṡamarāt(i), inna fī żālika la'āyatal liqaumiy yatafakkarūn(a).
verse.verse_12: Wa sakhkhara lakumul-laila wan-nahār(a), wasy-syamsa wal-qamar(a), wan-nujūmu musakhkharātum bi'amrih(ī), inna fī żālika la'āyātil liqaumiy ya‘qilūn(a).
verse.verse_13: Wa mā żara'a lakum fil-arḍi mukhtalifan alwānuh(ū), inna fī żālika la'āyatal liqaumiy yażżakkarūn(a).
verse.verse_14: Wa huwal-lażī sakhkharal-baḥra lita'kulū minhu laḥman ṭariyyaw wa tastakhrijū minhu ḥilyatan talbasūnahā, wa taral-fulka mawākhira fīhi wa litabtagū min faḍlihī wa la‘allakum tasykurūn(a).
verse.verse_15: Wa alqā fil-arḍi rawāsiya an tamīda bikum wa anhāraw wa subulal la‘allakum tahtadūn(a).
verse.verse_17: Afamay yakhluqu kamal lā yakhluq(u), afalā tażakkarūn(a).
verse.verse_18: Wa in ta‘uddū ni‘matallāhi lā tuḥṣūhā, innallāha lagafūrur raḥīm(un).
verse.verse_19: Wallāhu ya‘lamu mā tusirrūna wa mā tu‘linūn(a).
verse.verse_20: Wal-lażīna yad‘ūna min dūnillāhi  lā yakhluqūna syai'aw wa hum yukhlaqūn(a).
verse.verse_21: Amwātun gairu aḥyā'(in), wa mā yasy‘urūna ayyāna yub‘aṡūn(a).
verse.verse_22: Ilāhukum ilāhuw wāḥid(un), fal-lażīna lā yu'minūna bil-ākhirati qulūbuhum munkiratuw wa hum mustakbirūn(a).
verse.verse_23: Lā jarama annallāha ya‘lamu mā yusirrūna wa mā yu‘linūn(a), innahū lā yuḥibbul-mustakbirīn(a).
verse.verse_24: Wa iżā qīla lahum māżā anzala rabbukum, qālū asāṭīrul-awwalīn(a).
verse.verse_25: Liyaḥmilū auzārahum kāmilatay yaumal-qiyāmah(ti), wa min auzāril-lażīna yuḍillūnahum bigairi ‘ilm(in), alā sā'a mā yazirūn(a).
verse.verse_26: Qad makaral-lażīna min qablihim fa atallāhu bun-yānahum minal-qawā‘idi fa kharra ‘alaihimus-saqfu min fauqihim wa atāhumul-‘ażābu min ḥaiṡu lā yasy‘urūn(a).
verse.verse_27: Ṡumma yaumal-qiyāmati yukhzīhim wa yaqūlu aina syurakā'iyal-lażīna kuntum tusyāqqūna fīhim, qālal-lażīna ūtul-‘ilma innal-khizyal-yauma was-sū'a ‘alal-kāfirīn(a).
verse.verse_28: Allażīna tatawaffāhumul-malā'ikatu ẓālimī anfusihim, fa alqawus-salama mā kunnā na‘malu min sū'(in), balā innallāha ‘alīmum bimā kuntum ta‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_29: Fadkhulū abwāba jahannama khālidīna fīhā, fa labi'sa maṡwal-mutakabbirīn(a).
verse.verse_30: Wa qīla lil-lażīnattaqau māżā anzala rabbukum, qālū khairā(n), lil-lażīna aḥsanū fī hāżihid-dun-yā ḥasanah(tun), wa ladārul-ākhirati khair(un), wa lani‘ma dārul-muttaqīn(a).
verse.verse_31: Jannātu ‘adniy yadkhulūnahā tajrī min taḥtihal-anhāru lahum fīhā mā yasyā'ūn(a), każālika yajzillāhul-muttaqīn(a).
verse.verse_32: Allażīna tatawafāhumul-malā'ikatu ṭayyibīn(a), yaqūlūna salāmun ‘alaikumudkhulul-jannata bimā kuntum ta‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_33: Hal yanẓurūna illā an ta'tiyahumul-malā'ikatu au ya'tiya amru rabbik(a), każālika fa‘alal-lażīna min qablihim, wa mā ẓalamahumullāhu wa lākin kānū anfusahum yaẓlimūn(a).
verse.verse_34: Fa aṣābahum sayyi'ātu mā ‘amilū wa ḥāqa bihim mā kānū bihī yastahzi'ūn(a).
verse.verse_35: Wa qālal-lażīna asyrakū lau syā'allāhu mā ‘abadnā min dūnihī min syai'in naḥnu wa lā ābā'unā wa lā ḥarramnā min dūnihī min syai'(in), każālika fa‘alal-lażīna min qablihim, fahal ‘alar-rusuli illal-balāgul-mubīn(u).
verse.verse_36: Wa laqad ba‘aṡnā fī kulli ummatir rasūlan ani‘budullāha wajtanibuṭ-ṭāgūt(a), fa minhum man hadallāhu wa minhum man ḥaqqat ‘alaihiḍ-ḍalālah(tu), fa sīrū fil-arḍi fanẓurū kaifa kāna ‘āqibatul-mukażżibīn(a).
verse.verse_37: In taḥriṣ ‘alā hudāhum fa innallāha lā yahdī may yuḍillu wa mā lahum min nāṣirīn(a).
verse.verse_38: Wa aqsamū billāhi jahda aimānihim, lā yab‘aṡullāhu may yamūt(u), balā wa‘dan ‘alaihi ḥaqqaw wa lākinna akṡaran-nāsi lā ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_39: Liyubayyina lahumul-lażī yakhtalifūna fīhi wa liya‘lamal-lażīna kafarū annahum kānū-kāżibīn(a).
verse.verse_40: Innamā qaulunā lisyai'in iżā aradnāhu an naqūla lahū kun fa yakūn(u).
verse.verse_41: Wal-lażīna hājarū fillāhi mim ba‘di mā ẓulimū lanubawwi'annahum fid-dun-yā ḥasanah(tan), wa la'ajrul-ākhirati akbar(u), lau kānū ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_43: Wa mā arsalnā min qablika illā rijālan nūḥī ilaihim fas'alū ahlaż-żikri in kuntum lā ta‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_44: Bil-bayyināti waz-zubur(i), wa anzalnā ilaikaż-żikra litubayyina lin-nāsi mā nuzzila ilaihim wa la‘allahum yatafakkarūn(a).
verse.verse_45: Afa aminal-lażīna makarus-sayyi'āti ay yakhsifallāhu bihimul-arḍa au ya'tiyahumul-‘ażābu min ḥaiṡu lā yasy‘urūn(a).
verse.verse_46: Au ya'khużahum fī taqallubihim famā hum bimu‘jizīn(a).
verse.verse_47: Au ya'khużahum ‘alā takhawwuf(in), fa inna rabbakum lara'ūfur raḥīm(un).
verse.verse_48: Awalam yarau ilā mā khalaqallāhu min syai'iy yatafayya'u ẓilāluhū ‘anil-yamīni wasy-syamā'ili sujjadal lillāhi wa hum dākhirūn(a).
verse.verse_49: Wa lillāhi yasjudu mā fis-samāwāti wa mā fil-arḍi min dābbatiw wal-malā'ikatu wa hum yastakbirūn(a).
verse.verse_50: Yakhāfūna rabbahum min fauqihim wa yaf‘alūna mā yu'marūn(a).
verse.verse_51: Wa qālallāhu lā tattakhiżū ilāhainiṡnain(i), innamā huwa ilāhuw wāḥidun fa iyyāya farhabūn(i).
verse.verse_52: Wa lahū mā fis-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa lahud-dīnu wāṣibā(n), afagairallāhi tattaqūn(a).
verse.verse_53: Wa mā bikum min ni‘matin fa minallāhi ṡumma iżā massakumuḍ-ḍurru fa ilaihi taj'arūn(a).
verse.verse_54: Ṡumma iżā kasyafaḍ-ḍurra ‘ankum iżā farīqum minkum birabbihim yusyrikūn(a).
verse.verse_55: Liyakfurū bimā ātaināhum, fa tamatta‘ū fa saufa ta‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_56: Wa yaj‘alūna limā lā ya‘lamūna naṣībam mimmā razaqnāhum, tallāhi latus'alunna ‘ammā kuntum taftarūn(a).
verse.verse_57: Wa yaj‘alūna lillāhil-banāti subḥānah(ū), wa lahum mā yasytahūn(a).
verse.verse_58: Wa iżā busysyira aḥaduhum bil-unṡā ẓalla wajhuhū muswaddaw wa huwa kaẓīm(un).
verse.verse_59: Yatawārā minal-qaumi min sū'i mā busysyira bih(ī), ayumsikuhū ‘alā hūnin am yadussuhū fit-turāb(i), alā sā'a mā yaḥkumūn(a).
verse.verse_60: Lil-lażīna lā yu'minūna bil-ākhirati maṡalus-sau'(i), wa lillāhil-maṡalul-a‘lā, wa huwal-‘azīzul-ḥakīm(u).
verse.verse_61: Wa lau yu'ākhiżullāhun-nāsa biẓulmihim mā taraka ‘alaihā min dābbatiw wa lākiy yu'akhkhiruhum ilā ajalim musammā(n), fa iżā jā'a ajaluhum lā yasta'khirūna sā‘ataw wa lā yastaqdimūn(a).
verse.verse_62: Wa yaj‘alūna lillāhi mā yakrahūna wa taṣifu alsinatuhumul-każiba anna lahumul-ḥusnā lā jarama anna lahumun nāra  wa annahum mufraṭūn(a).
verse.verse_63: Tallāhi laqad arsalnā ilā umamim min qablika fa zayyana lahumusy-syaiṭānu a‘mālahum fa huwa waliyyuhumul-yauma wa lahum ‘ażābun alīm(un).
verse.verse_64: Wa mā anzalnā ‘alaikal-kitāba illā litubayyina lahumul-lażikhtalafū fīh(i), wa hudaw wa raḥmatal liqaumiy yu'minūn(a).
verse.verse_65: Wallāhu anzala minas-samā'i mā'an fa aḥyā bihil-arḍa ba‘da mautihā, inna fī żālika la'āyatal liqaumiy yasma‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_66: Wa inna lakum fil-an‘āmi la‘ibrah(tan), nusqīkum mimmā fī buṭūnihī mim baini farṡiw wa damil labanan khāliṣan sā'igal lisy-syāribīn(a).
verse.verse_67: Wa min ṡamarātin nakhīli wal-a‘nābi tattakhiżūna minhu sakaraw wa rizqan ḥasanā(n), inna fī żālika la'āyatal liqaumiy ya‘qilūn(a).
verse.verse_68: Wa auḥā rabbuka ilan-naḥli anittakhiżī minal-jibāli buyūtaw wa minasy-syajari wa mimmā ya‘risyūn(a).
verse.verse_69: Ṡumma kulī min kulliṡ-ṡamarāti faslukī subula rabbiki żululā(n), yakhruju mim buṭūnihā syarābum mukhtalifun alwānuhū fīhi syifā'ul lin-nās(i), inna fī żālika la'āyatal liqaumiy yatafakkarūn(a).
verse.verse_70: Wallāhu khalaqakum ṡumma yatawaffākum wa minkum may yuraddu ilā arżalil-‘umuri  likai lā ya‘lama ba‘da ‘ilmin syai'ā(n), innallāha ‘alīmun qadīr(un).
verse.verse_71: Wallāhu faḍḍala ba‘ḍakum ‘alā ba‘ḍin fir-rizq(i), famal-lażīna fuḍḍilū birāddī rizqihim ‘alā mā malakat aimānuhum fahum fīhi sawā'un afa bini‘matillāhi yajḥadūn(a).
verse.verse_72: Wallāhu ja‘ala lakum min anfusikum azwājaw wa ja‘ala lakum min azwājikum banīna wa ḥafadataw wa razaqakum minaṭ-ṭayyibāt(i), afabil-bāṭili yu'minūna wa bini‘matillāhi yakfurūn(a).
verse.verse_73: Wa ya‘budūna min dūnillāhi mā lā yamliku lahum rizqam minas-samāwāti wal-arḍi syai'aw wa lā yastaṭī‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_74: Falā taḍribū lillāhil-amṡāl(a), innallāha ya‘lamu wa antum lā ta‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_75: Ḍaraballāhu maṡalan ‘abdam mamlūkal lā yaqdiru ‘alā syai'iw wa mar razaqnāhu minnā rizqan ḥasanan fa huwa yunfiqu minhu sirraw wa jahrā(n), hal yastawūn(a), al-ḥamdu lillāh(i), bal akṡaruhum lā ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_76: Wa ḍaraballāhu maṡalar rajulaini aḥaduhumā abkamu lā yaqdiru ‘alā syai'iw wa huwa kallun ‘alā maulāh(u), ainamā yuwajjihhu lā ya'ti bikhair(in), hal yastawī huw(a), wa may ya'muru bil-‘adli wa huwa ‘alā ṣirāṭim mustaqīm(in).
verse.verse_77: Wa lillāhi gaibus-samāwāti wal-arḍ(i), wa mā amrus-sā‘ati illā kalamḥil-baṣari au huwa aqrab(u), innallāha ‘alā kulli syai'in qadīr(un).
verse.verse_78: Wallāhu akhrajakum mim buṭūni ummahātikum lā ta‘lamūna syai'ā(n), wa ja‘ala lakumus-sam‘a wal-abṣāra wal-af'idah(ta), la‘allakum tasykurūn(a).
verse.verse_79: Alam yarau ilaṭ-ṭairi musakhkharātin fī jawwis-samā'(i), mā yumsikuhunna illallāh(u), inna fī żālika la'āyātil liqaumiy yu'minūn(a).
verse.verse_80: Wallāhu ja‘ala lakum mim buyūtikum sakanaw wa ja‘ala lakum min julūdil-an‘āmi buyūtan tastakhiffūnahā yauma ẓa‘nikum wa yauma iqāmatikum, wa min aṣwāfihā wa aubārihā wa asy‘ārihā aṡāṡaw wa matā‘an ilā ḥīn(in).
verse.verse_81: Wallāhu ja‘ala lakum mimmā khalaqa ẓilālaw wa ja‘ala lakum minal-jibāli aknānaw wa ja‘ala lakum sarābīla taqīkumul-ḥarra wa sarābīla taqīkum ba'sakum, każālika yutimmu ni‘matahū ‘alaikum la‘allakum tuslimūn(a).
verse.verse_83: Ya‘rifūna ni‘matallāhi ṡumma yunkirūnahā wa akṡaruhumul-kāfirūn(a).
verse.verse_84: Wa yauma nab‘aṡu min kulli ummatin syahīdan ṡumma lā yu'żanu lil-lażīna kafarū wa lā hum yusta‘tabūn(a).
verse.verse_85: Wa iżā ra'al-lażīna ẓalamul-‘ażāba falā yukhaffafu ‘anhum wa lā hum yunẓarūn(a).
verse.verse_86: Wa iżā ra'al-lażīna asyrakū syurakā'ahum qālū rabbanā hā'ulā'i syurakā'unal-lażīna kunnā nad‘ū min dūnik(a), fa alqau ilaihimul-qaula innakum lakāżibūn(a).
verse.verse_87: Wa alqau ilallāhi yauma'iżinis-salama wa ḍalla ‘anhum mā kānū yaftarūn(a).
verse.verse_88: Allażīna kafarū wa ṣaddū ‘an sabīlillāhi zidnāhum ‘ażāban fauqal-‘ażābi bimā kānū yufsidūn(a).
verse.verse_89: Wa yauma nab‘aṡu fī kulli ummatin syahīdan ‘alaihim min anfusihim wa ji'nā bika syahīdan ‘alā hā'ulā'(i), wa nazzalnā ‘alaikal-kitāba tibyānal likulli syai'iw wa hudaw wa raḥmataw wa busyrā lil-muslimīn(a).
verse.verse_90: Innallāha ya'muru bil-‘adli wal-iḥsāni wa ītā'i żil-qurbā wa yanhā ‘anil-faḥsyā'i wal-munkari wal-bagyi ya‘iẓukum la‘allakum tażakkarūn(a).
verse.verse_91: Wa aufū bi‘ahdillāhi iżā ‘āhattum wa lā tanquḍul-aimāna ba‘da taukīdihā wa qad ja‘altumullāha ‘alaikum kafīlā(n), innallāha ya‘lamu mā taf‘alūn(a).
verse.verse_92: Wa lā takūnū kal-latī naqaḍat gazlahā mim ba‘di quwwatin ankāṡā(n), tattakhiżūna aimānakum dakhalam bainakum an takūna ummatun hiya arbā min ummah(tin), innamā yablūkumullāhu bih(ī), wa layubayyinanna lakum yaumal-qiyāmati mā kuntum fīhi takhtalifūn(a).
verse.verse_93: Wa lau syā'allāhu laja‘alakum ummataw wāḥidataw wa lākiy yuḍillu may yasyā'u wa yahdī may yasyā'(u), wa latus'alunna ‘ammā kuntum ta‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_94: Wa lā tattakhiżū aimānakum dakhalam bainakum fa tazilla qadamum ba‘da ṡubūtihā wa tażūqus-sū'a bimā ṣadattum ‘an sabīlillāh(i), wa lakum ‘ażābun ‘aẓīm(un).
verse.verse_95: Wa lā tasytarū bi‘ahdillāhi ṡamanan qalīlā(n), innamā ‘indallāhi huwa khairul lakum  in kuntum ta‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_96: Mā ‘indakum yanfadu wa mā ‘indallāhi bāq(in), wa lanajziyannal-lażīna ṣabarū ajrahum bi'aḥsani mā kānū ya‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_97: Man ‘amila ṣāliḥam min żakarin au unṡā wa huwa mu'minun fa lanuḥyiyannahū ḥayātan ṭayyibah(tan), wa lanajziyannahum ajrahum bi'aḥsani mā kānū ya‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_98: Fa iżā qara'tal-qur'āna fasta‘iż billāhi minasy-syaiṭānir-rajīm(i).
verse.verse_99: Innahū laisa lahū sulṭānun ‘alal-lażīna āmanū wa ‘alā rabbihim yatawakkalūn(a).
verse.verse_100: Innamā sulṭānuhū ‘alal-lażīna yatawallaunahū wal-lażīna hum bihī musyrikūn(a).
verse.verse_101: Wa iżā baddalnā āyatam makāna āyah(tin), wallāhu a‘lamu bimā yunazzilu qālū innamā anta muftar(in), bal akṡaruhum lā ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_102: Qul nazzalahū rūḥul-qudusi mir rabbika bil-ḥaqqi liyuṡabbital-lażīna āmanū wa hudaw wa busyrā lil-muslimīn(a).
verse.verse_103: Wa laqad na‘lamu annahum yaqūlūna innamā yu‘allimuhū basyar(un), lisānul-lażī yulḥidūna ilaihi a‘jamiyyuw wa hāżā lisānun ‘arabiyyum mubīn(un).
verse.verse_104: Innal-lażīna lā yu'minūna bi'āyātillāh(i), lā yahdīhimullāhu wa lahum ‘ażābun alīm(un).
verse.verse_105: Innamā yaftaril-każibal-lażīna lā yu'minūna bi'āyātillāh(i), ulā'ika humul-kāżibūn(a).
verse.verse_106: Man kafara billāhi mim ba‘di īmānihī illā man ukriha wa qalbuhū muṭma'innum bil-īmāni wa lākim man syaraḥa bil-kufri ṣadran fa ‘alaihim gaḍabum minallāh(i), wa lahum ‘ażābun aẓīm(un).
verse.verse_107: Żālika bi'annahumustaḥabbul-ḥayātad-dun-yā ‘alal-ākhirah(ti), wa annallāha lā yahdil-qaumal-kāfirīn(a).
verse.verse_108: Ulā'ikal-lażīna ṭaba‘allāhu ‘alā qulūbihim wa sam‘ihim wa abṣārihim, wa ulā'ika humul-gāfilūn(a).
verse.verse_110: Ṡumma inna rabbaka lil-lażīna hājarū mim ba‘di mā futinū ṡumma jāhadū wa ṣabarū, inna rabbaka mim ba‘dihā lagafūrur raḥīm(un).
verse.verse_111: Yauma ta'tī kullu nafsin tujādilu ‘an nafsihā wa tuwaffā kullu nafsim mā ‘amilat wa hum lā yuẓlamūn(a).
verse.verse_112: Wa ḍaraballāhu maṡalan qaryatan kānat āminatam muṭma'innatay ya'tīhā rizquhā ragadam min kulli makānin fa kafarat bi'an‘umillāhi fa ażāqahallāhu libāsal-jū‘i wal-khaufi bimā kānū yaṣna‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_113: Wa laqad jā'ahum rasūlum minhum fa każżabūhu fa akhażahumul-‘ażābu wa hum ẓālimūn(a).
verse.verse_114: Fa kulū mimmā razaqakumullāhu ḥalālan ṭayyibā(n), wasykurū ni‘matallāhi in kuntum iyyāhu ta‘budūn(a).
verse.verse_115: Innamā ḥarrama ‘alaikumul-maitata wad-dama wa laḥmal-khinzīri wa mā uhilla ligairillāhi bih(ī), famaniḍṭurra gaira bāgiw wa lā ‘ādin fa innallāha gafūrur raḥīm(un).
verse.verse_116: Wa lā taqūlū limā taṣifu alsinatukumul-każiba hāżā ḥalāluw wa hāżā ḥarāmul litaftarū ‘alallāhil-każib(a), innal-lażīna yaftarūna ‘alallāhil-każiba lā yufliḥūn(a).
verse.verse_118: Wa ‘alal-lażīna hādū ḥarramnā mā qaṣaṣnā ‘alaika min qabl(u), wa mā ẓalamnāhum wa lākin kānū anfusahum yaẓlimūn(a).
verse.verse_119: Ṡumma inna rabbaka lil-lażīna ‘amilus-sū'a bijahālatin ṡumma tābū mim ba‘di żālika wa aṣlaḥū inna rabbaka mim ba‘dihā lagafūrur raḥīm(un).
verse.verse_120: Inna ibrāhīma kāna ummatan qānital lillāhi ḥanīfā(n), wa lam yaku minal-musyrikīn(a).
verse.verse_121: Syākiral li'an‘umih(ī), ijtabāhu wa hadāhu ilā ṣirāṭim mustaqīm(in).
verse.verse_122: Wa ātaināhu fid-dun-yā ḥasanah(tan), wa innahū fil-ākhirati laminaṣ-ṣāliḥīn(a).
verse.verse_123: Ṡumma auḥainā ilaika anittabi‘ millata ibrāhīma ḥanīfā(n), wa mā kāna minal-musyrikīn(a).
verse.verse_124: Innamā ju‘ilas-sabtu ‘alal-lażīnakhtalafū fīh(i), wa inna rabbaka layaḥkumu bainahum yaumal-qiyāmati fīmā kānū fīhi yakhtalifūn(a).
verse.verse_125: Ud‘u ilā sabīli rabbika bil-ḥikmati wal-mau‘iẓatil-ḥasanati wa jādilhum bil-latī hiya aḥsan(u), inna rabbaka huwa a‘lamu biman ḍalla ‘an sabīlihī wa huwa a‘lamu bil-muhtadīn(a).
verse.verse_126: Wa in ‘āqabtum fa ‘āqibū bimiṡli mā ‘ūqibtum bih(ī), wa la'in ṣabartum lahuwa khairul liṣ-ṣābirīn(a).
verse.verse_127: Waṣbir wa mā ṣabruka illā billāhi wa lā taḥzan ‘alaihim wa lā taku fī ḍaiqim mimmā yamkurūn(a).
